items.title: Copper Giant Reports First Quarter Financial Results
items.summary: Copper Giant Resources Corp. reports interim financial results for the three-month period ended March 31, 2026.

items.title: Copper Giant Announces Additional Showings at Mocoa
items.summary: Drilling intersected thick intervals of strongly mineralized porphyry and breccia at depth, approximately 750 meters southeast of La Estrella.

items.title: Copper Giant Announces AGM Results
items.summary: Copper Giant Resources Corp. announces voting results from its 2026 Annual General Meeting of Shareholders.

items.title: Copper Giant Announces Granting of Stock Options
items.summary: Copper Giant Resources Corp. announces the granting of stock options to certain directors, officers, and consultants.

items.title: Copper Giant Files Preliminary Economic Assessment
items.summary: Copper Giant files a Preliminary Economic Assessment for the Mocoa Copper-Molybdenum Project in accordance with NI 43-101.

items.title: Copper Giant Announces Appointment of New Director
items.summary: Copper Giant Resources Corp. is pleased to announce the appointment of Mr. Jamie Sokalsky as a Director of the Company.

items.title: Copper Giant Reports Expiry of Options
items.summary: Copper Giant Resources Corp. reports that 1,800,000 stock options previously issued to a former officer have expired unexercised.

items.title: Copper Giant Announces Filing of Preliminary Economic Assessment
items.summary: Copper Giant Resources Corp. announces filing of a Preliminary Economic Assessment for the Mocoa Copper-Molybdenum Project.

items.title: Copper Giant Drills Highest Grade Interval to Date at Mocoa
items.summary: Massive sulphide intercepts found in the Mocoa Deposit's Central Porphyry continue to expand along the recently discovered Connector Zone.

items.title: Copper Giant Files MD&A
items.summary: Copper Giant Resources Corp. has filed its interim management's discussion and analysis for the three and nine months ended September 30, 2025.

items.title: Copper Giant Discovers Major New Target at Mocoa
items.summary: High-grade copper-molybdenum breccia mineralization discovered approximately 1.5 km southeast from the Mocoa deposit.

items.title: Copper Giant Signs Drilling Contract at Mocoa
items.summary: Major drilling campaign to commence at Mocoa Copper-Molybdenum Project. Building on the largest undeveloped resource in the Americas.

items.title: Copper Giant Completes First Tranche of Private Placement
items.summary: Copper Giant closes first tranche of non-brokered private placement for gross proceeds of approximately $3.2 million.
